channel.title: GitHub Groovy Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Groovy in GitHub

item.title: gradle/gradle
item.description: Adaptable, fast automation for all

item.title: embeddedartistry/templates
item.description: Document templates for open-source projects (README, CONTRIBUTING, GitHub templates)

item.title: olxbr/gradle-plugins
item.description: Gradle plugins that can be used for several projects

item.title: HujiangTechnology/gradle_plugin_android_aspectjx
item.description: A Android gradle plugin that effects AspectJ on Android project and can hook methods in Kotlin, aar and jar file.

item.title: spockframework/spock-example
item.description: Spock example specifications along with ready-to-go Gradle and Maven builds

item.title: ben-manes/gradle-versions-plugin
item.description: Gradle plugin to discover dependency updates

item.title: OneSignal/OneSignal-Gradle-Plugin
item.description: Use with OneSignal-Android-SDK to help integrate it into your Android Studio or Gradle project. https://onesignal.com

item.title: bregman-arie/devops-resources
item.description: DevOps resources - Linux, Jenkins, AWS, SRE, Prometheus, Docker, Python, Ansible, Git, Kubernetes, Terraform, OpenStack, SQL, NoSQL, Azure, GCP

item.title: jfrog/artifactory-user-plugins
item.description: Sample Artifactory User Plugins

item.title: geerlingguy/ansible-role-jenkins
item.description: Ansible Role - Jenkins CI

item.title: g0t4/course-jenkins-getting-started
item.description: Jenkins Getting Started (jgsu) Course Materials - An update to my initial version of the course

item.title: SmartThingsCommunity/SmartThingsPublic
item.description: SmartThings open-source DeviceTypeHandlers and SmartApps code

item.title: spinnaker/orca
item.description: Orchestration engine

item.title: rundeck/rundeck
item.description: Enable Self-Service Operations: Give specific users access to your existing tools, services, and scripts

item.title: researchgate/gradle-release
item.description: gradle-release is a plugin for providing a Maven-like release process for projects using Gradle

item.title: node-gradle/gradle-node-plugin
item.description: Gradle plugin for integrating NodeJS in your build. 🚀

item.title: nextflow-io/nextflow
item.description: A DSL for data-driven computational pipelines

item.title: AdobeDocs/experience-manager-65.en
item.description: This is the repository for Adobe Experience Manager 6.5 documentation. Your contributions to the documentation are welcome.

item.title: ansible-ThoTeam/nexus3-oss
item.description: Ansible role to install and provision sonatype nexus3-oss

item.title: ultraq/thymeleaf-layout-dialect
item.description: A dialect for Thymeleaf that lets you build layouts and reusable templates in order to improve code reuse

item.title: avast/gradle-docker-compose-plugin
item.description: Simplifies usage of Docker Compose for integration testing in Gradle environment.

item.title: adhocteam/jenkins
item.description: Jenkins primary node Dockerfile
